mte_summary: BPMS015 Validation for Subcontracted Requisitions (Peg/GI/Blank BP/Multi-line)

test_cases.summary: Functional Test: Auto-Rejection for Missing Peg/GI Info

description.scenario: Create a purchase requisition using a subcontracted item that lacks pegging or Goods Issue information. Submit the requisition for approval via BPMS015. Verify the system auto-rejects the request immediately and sends an email notification detailing the missing information.
description.expected_result: Requisition is auto-rejected and rejection email with missing info reasons is sent.

steps.action: Create purchase requisition using a subcontracted item without peg or GI data
Submit purchase requisition for approval via BPMS015
steps.expected_result: System auto-rejects request and sends email notification

test_cases.summary: Functional Test: Rejection after Buyer Review for Blank BP/EMP Supplier

description.scenario: Create a purchase requisition with a subcontracted item having blank Business Partner or EMPloyee supplier data. Submit the requisition for approval and complete Buyer Review. Verify the system rejects the request after buyer review and sends an email notification.
description.expected_result: Requisition rejected after buyer review with email notification regarding blank BP/EMP.

steps.action: Create purchase requisition using a subcontracted item with blank Business Partner or EMPloyee supplier
Submit purchase requisition for approval and complete Buyer Review
steps.expected_result: Request moves to BPMS015 workflow pending decision

steps.action: Verify system rejects request after buyer review and email notification is received
steps.expected_result: Requisition rejected and rejection email sent

test_cases.summary: Functional Test: Rejection for SubConDefault Items Unlinked to Production Orders

description.scenario: Create a purchase requisition using a subcontracted item configured as a default (SubConDefault) but not linked to any active production orders. Submit the requisition for approval via BPMS015. Verify the system rejects the request and sends an email notification about the unlinked item.
description.expected_result: Requisition rejected and rejection email sent regarding missing link to production order.

steps.action: Create purchase requisition using a subcontracted item configured as SubConDefault without linked production order
Submit purchase requisition for approval via BPMS015
steps.expected_result: System rejects request and sends email notification

test_cases.summary: Functional Test: Rejection for Multi-line Requisitions with Subcontracted Items

description.scenario: Create a multi-line purchase requisition where at least one line is a subcontracted item. Submit the requisition for approval via BPMS015. Verify the system rejects the entire request and sends an email notification stating rejection due to multi-line condition with subcontracted items.
description.expected_result: Requisition rejected and rejection email sent regarding multi-line subcontracted items.

steps.action: Create a multi-line purchase requisition containing at least one subcontracted item
Submit the multi-line purchase requisition for approval via BPMS015
steps.expected_result: System rejects request and sends email notification

test_cases.summary: Regression Test: Happy Path Standard Purchase Requisition

description.scenario: Create a standard purchase requisition with valid data (non-subcontracted item, valid peg/GI). Submit for approval through BPMS015. Complete Buyer Review and DOA to approve the PO. Verify Purchase Order is generated successfully.
description.expected_result: Purchase order generated and approved without interruption.

steps.action: Create a standard purchase requisition with valid data
Submit for approval and verify BPMS015 accepts it
Run Buyer Work Queue (BWQ) and accept Purchase Requisition
steps.expected_result: Requisition accepted and status changes to Converted

steps.action: Verify Purchase Order is generated successfully
